title: linum heterosepalum subsp. olgae
intro: Linum heterosepalum subsp. olgae is a subspecies of flax plant, belonging to the genus Linum and the family Linaceae. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a rich source of linseed oil and omega-3 fatty acids. The health benefits of Linum heterosepalum subsp. olgae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of oil, capsules, or tea, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
